floorPlan.note: Aligned to user-marked ZONE_FLOOR (SketchUp face painted with ZONE_FLOOR material). Origin = its min corner. Zones extracted via tools/extract-zones.mjs.
floorPlan.placeableAreas: 2 polygons (green) from ZONE_FLOOR = size-rectangle minus restricted zones; furniture confined here
floorPlan.note2: Real floor is non-rectangular & disconnected (left L + right rectangle). Room outline unions to a clean rectangle 4420×2540.
